fieldValues.value: SRS MUST operate with no `com.semanticops.base` package installed and no `attachment_policy` record present. When the base package is absent: all MIME types are accepted for attachments; no per-file, per-document, or aggregate size limits are enforced; no diagnostics are emitted solely due to the absence of the base package. An implementation MUST NOT refuse to load, validate, or export a repository on the grounds that no base package is present.

Without an explicit invariant, implementations may interpret base-package absence as misconfiguration. SRS's design goal is repositories that work out of the box with only the core package; this invariant enforces that goal normatively.
